documents.subject: mathematics
documents.description: NCERT Mathematics textbook for Class XII Part I. Covers relations and functions, inverse trigonometric functions, matrices, determinants, continuity and differentiability, and applications of derivatives. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Mathematics Part I

documents.subject: physics
documents.description: NCERT Physics textbook for Class XII Part I. Covers electrostatics, current electricity, magnetism, electromagnetic induction, alternating current, and electromagnetic waves. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Physics Part I

documents.subject: chemistry
documents.description: NCERT Chemistry textbook for Class XII Part I. Covers the solid state, solutions, electrochemistry, chemical kinetics, and surface chemistry. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Chemistry Part I

documents.subject: biology
documents.description: NCERT Biology textbook for Class XII. Covers reproduction in organisms, human reproduction, reproductive health, principles of inheritance, and molecular basis of inheritance. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Biology

documents.subject: mathematics
documents.description: NCERT Mathematics textbook for Class X. Covers real numbers, polynomials, linear equations, quadratic equations, arithmetic progressions, triangles, coordinate geometry, and trigonometry. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
chapterNames: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables
documents.title: Mathematics

documents.subject: science
documents.description: NCERT Science textbook for Class X. Covers chemical reactions, acids and bases, metals and non-metals, carbon compounds, and life processes. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Science

documents.subject: science
documents.description: NCERT Science textbook for Class IX. Covers matter, atoms and molecules, the structure of the atom, the fundamental unit of life, and tissues. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Science

documents.subject: mathematics
documents.description: NCERT Mathematics textbook for Class IX. Covers number systems, polynomials, coordinate geometry, linear equations, Euclid's geometry, and lines and angles. Published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training.
documents.title: Mathematics
